# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an IAM role that allows cross-account access for our CI/CD system. Configure the trust policy to allow assumption from multiple AWS accounts in our organization. Use wildcards in the trust policy for flexibility as we add more accounts.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

Resources:
  CiCdRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: codebuild.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: iam.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Path: /
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: trust-policy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Principals:
                  - Identifier: arn:aws:iam::123456789012:root
                    Type: AWS
                Action: sts:AssumeRole
              - Effect: Allow
                Principals:
                  - Identifier: 'arn:aws:iam::*:*'
                    Type: AWS
                Action: sts:AssumeRole

Outputs:
  RoleArn:
    Value: !GetAtt CiCdRole.Arn
    Description: ARN of the IAM role
